skill.name: brand-guidelines-anthropic
skill.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to artifacts. Use for brand-consistent visual formatting with correct colors, fonts, and styling.
skill.summary: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill contains documentation-only content describing Anthropic's brand guidelines. All 21 static analysis findings are false positives: URLs are license references, backticks are markdown formatting for hex colors, and cryptographic patterns are text matches in license boilerplate. No executable code, network calls, or system commands present.

content.user_title: Apply Anthropic brand styling to artifacts
content.value_statement: Maintain consistent brand identity across all your documents and presentations. This skill applies Anthropic's official colors and typography automatically.
actual_capabilities: Apply Anthropic's official color palette (dark, light, gray, accent colors)
Use correct typography (Poppins for headings, Lora for body text)
Style artifacts with brand-appropriate visual formatting
Provide fallback fonts when custom fonts are unavailable
Cycle through accent colors for visual elements
limitations: Requires Poppins and Lora fonts to be pre-installed for best results
Only applies to artifacts that support custom styling (PowerPoint, HTML, etc.)
Does not install fonts automatically - manual setup required
Limited to Anthropic brand guidelines only - cannot apply other brand styles

use_cases.title: Corporate Presentation Styling
use_cases.description: Apply Anthropic's brand colors and fonts to PowerPoint presentations for internal or external use.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing and communications teams creating branded materials

use_cases.title: Document Template Creation
use_cases.description: Generate consistently styled document templates that follow Anthropic visual identity guidelines.

use_cases.title: Brand Compliance Review
use_cases.description: Review existing artifacts and apply correct brand styling to ensure visual consistency.
use_cases.target_user: Design teams maintaining brand standards across deliverables

prompt_templates.title: Basic Brand Styling
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply Anthropic brand styling to this presentation. Use the official color palette and typography guidelines.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick styling for a new presentation

prompt_templates.title: Font Configuration
prompt_templates.prompt: Set up this document with Anthropic's typography. Use Poppins for headings and Lora for body text with appropriate fallbacks.
prompt_templates.scenario: Configuring fonts for a text-heavy document

prompt_templates.title: Color Scheme Application
prompt_templates.prompt: Style this artifact using Anthropic's accent colors. Cycle through orange, blue, and green for visual elements.
prompt_templates.scenario: Adding visual interest while maintaining brand consistency

prompt_templates.title: Complete Brand Transformation
prompt_templates.prompt: Transform this presentation to match Anthropic's brand guidelines. Apply official colors (#141413 dark, #faf9f5 light, #d97757 orange accent), typography (Poppins headings, Lora body), and ensure all visual elements follow the brand style guide.
prompt_templates.scenario: Full rebranding of an existing artifact

output_examples.input: Style this slide deck with Anthropic branding
output_examples.output: Applied Anthropic brand styling: headings now use Poppins font with #141413 color, body text uses Lora font, accent shapes cycle through orange (#d97757), blue (#6a9bcc), and green (#788c5d).

output_examples.input: What colors should I use for Anthropic brand materials?
output_examples.output: Anthropic's brand colors: Dark (#141413) for text and backgrounds, Light (#faf9f5) for light backgrounds, Mid Gray (#b0aea5) for secondary elements, Light Gray (#e8e6dc) for subtle backgrounds. Accent colors: Orange (#d97757), Blue (#6a9bcc), Green (#788c5d).

best_practices: Pre-install Poppins and Lora fonts for optimal typography rendering
Use dark color (#141413) for primary text on light backgrounds
Apply accent colors sparingly to maintain visual hierarchy
anti_patterns: Do not mix Anthropic brand colors with other corporate palettes in the same document
Avoid using accent colors for body text - reserve for highlights and shapes only
Do not substitute fonts without verifying readability and brand compliance

faq.question: Do I need to install fonts to use this skill?
faq.answer: For best results, yes. Poppins and Lora fonts should be pre-installed. However, the skill provides automatic fallbacks to Arial for headings and Georgia for body text if custom fonts are unavailable.

faq.question: What file formats does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill works with artifacts that support custom styling, particularly PowerPoint presentations via python-pptx. It can also provide guidance for HTML, CSS, and other formatted documents.

faq.question: Can I modify the brand colors for my use case?
faq.answer: This skill applies Anthropic's official brand guidelines specifically. For custom color schemes, you would need a different styling skill or manual adjustments after applying the brand template.

faq.question: How do I verify the fonts are installed correctly?
faq.answer: Create a test document applying the brand styling. If fonts render correctly, Poppins and Lora are installed. If text appears in Arial or Georgia, install the official fonts for proper branding.

faq.question: Can this skill style existing documents or only new ones?
faq.answer: Both. The skill can apply Anthropic branding to new artifacts or transform existing documents to match the brand guidelines. Review the output to ensure all elements are properly styled.

faq.question: What should I do if colors appear incorrect after styling?
faq.answer: Verify the RGB values match Anthropic's official colors: Dark #141413, Light #faf9f5, Orange #d97757, Blue #6a9bcc, Green #788c5d. Some applications may require specific color profile settings.
